title: helichrysum obconicum
intro: Helichrysum obconicum, also known as the Tasmanian paper flower, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its yellow flowers and papery bracts. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum obconicum have been associated with reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
